narrativeProgression.summary: A dead account sends a fresh attachment with current geotag residue.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: The same footage frame arrives through Telegram with different timestamps for each player.

threadUpdates.update: Tape Reset: The same footage frame arrives through Telegram with different timestamps for each player.
Peripheral signal tied to Tripod footprint cast remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
A plausible shortcut appears: Field reenactment vs archive triangulation.
Subtle repetition appears in unrelated communications.

evidenceDrops.title: Tape 17: Pinewatch - Day 04 text message screenshot
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Tripod footprint cast.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Tape 17: Pinewatch ARG artifact Day 04. Type: text_message_screenshot. Clue focus: Tripod footprint cast. Location: Closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Tape 17: Pinewatch text_message_screenshot audio cue for day 4. Clue anchor: Tripod footprint cast. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Tripod footprint cast and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_03.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Tripod footprint cast.

puzzle.title: Day 04 Puzzle
puzzle.objective: Use the new evidence and prior logs to resolve contradiction around Tripod footprint cast.
instructions: Extract timestamp, sender route, and one lexical anomaly from today's artifacts.
Compare against at least one artifact from a previous day.
Submit a concise deduction statement before unlocking the next high-risk contact.
hintLadder: Hint 1: One timestamp appears valid but is offset from device timezone.
Hint 2: Cross-check sender metadata against yesterday's call-log route.
Hint 3: The answer keyword starts with TRIP.
puzzle.failureConsequence: Next day unlock remains delayed until one additional interaction is logged.

distraction.title: Red Herring 04
distraction.summary: A polished leak points toward an emotionally satisfying suspect, but timeline math does not support it.
distraction.whyItFeelsPlausible: It references Tripod footprint cast with convincing formatting and apparent chain-of-custody metadata.
distraction.hiddenFault: Embedded timezone marker is impossible for the claimed capture device, indicating staged fabrication.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
